titleStmt.title: SII 9.99: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 99. (A.R. No. 235 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SATTURU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 966, Tāraṇa, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1044 December 24, Monday (not verifiable), and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I). It records that, when Jagadēkamalla-Nanni-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permāḍidēva was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Kadambaḷige thousand, Ballakunde three-hundred and Kaṇiyakallu three-hundred, Sōvimayya, the head of Sattiyūru and Kupparasa, the Manneya of Māsavāḍi hundred-and-forty, made a gift of some land for the service of the god Mahādēva in Sattiyūru and placed it in charge of Dharmaśiva, son of Davadasiga.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladē
vara rājyamuttarōttarābhavriddhipravarddhamā
namācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya śrīprithvī
vallabha pallavakuḷatiḷakanēkavākya
kāṁcīpuravarēsvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkama
llanaṁninoḻaṁbapallavapermmāḍidēvaru kōga
ḷiyaynūṟuṁ kadaṁbaḷige sāyiramuṁ
ballakunde mūnūṟuṁ kaṇiyakallu mūnū
ṟanāḷuttamire sakavarṣa 966 neya tāraṇa saṁ
vatsaraduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu daṇḍanāyaka mārttaṇḍa
yyanaḷiya sattiyūra voḍeya sōvimayyanuṁ sama
staguṇasaṁpannaṁ raṇamūrkhkharāmaṁ yādavavaṁśōdbhavar
śrīmat māsavāḍi nūṟanālvattaṟa manneya
kupparasanuviḻdu sattiyūra mahādēvargge
banadabhaḷāriya baḍagaṇa deseyaluṁ
Eraḍu khaṇḍuga vedegaḻdeyu māvinapaḍugina ba
ḍagaṇa deseyalu pannirmmattarbeddaleyu nandā
dīvigegoṁdu gāṇamumaṁ davadasigana maga dharmma
sivaṁge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi viṭṭar Ida
nāvanobbanaḷidaṁ vāraṇāsiyalu sāyira kavile
yanaḷida mahāpātaka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhava
dbhiḥ . sarvvānētānu bhāginaṟpārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . gaṇapatāya namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
